headline: How Nvidia Stock Can Hit $300 After Earnings
summary: Nvidia  stock has lost some momentum recently, but analysts believe the chip maker can reassert its dominance in artificial-intelligence processors when fiscal first-quarter earnings arrive this week.  D.A. Davidson analyst Gil Luria also raised his target price to $300, from $250.
